name: aigate-cli
description: Pre-push Git safety CLI for AI-assisted coding.

scripts.check: node --check src/cli.mjs && node --check src/commands/first-run.mjs && node --check src/core/first-run.mjs && node --check src/renderers/first-run.mjs && node --check src/commands/github-reporting.mjs && node --check src/core/github-reporting.mjs && node --check src/core/github-setup.mjs && node --check src/renderers/github-reporting.mjs && node --check src/renderers/github-setup.mjs && node --check src/commands/trends.mjs && node --check src/core/trends.mjs && node --check src/renderers/trends.mjs
scripts.ci: npm run check && npm test && npm run docs:check-locales && npm run aigate:git-ready && npm pack --dry-run
scripts.prepare:push: npm run git:ready && node src/cli.mjs report --format markdown
